growingRoles.title: Producers & Directors
growingRoles.why: Creative vision, talent management, and production orchestration require human judgment. AI augments production workflows but cannot replace the orchestrator.

growingRoles.title: Multimedia Artists & Animators
growingRoles.why: Demand for visual content is exploding. AI compresses timelines but high-end animation and art direction remain deeply human.

growingRoles.title: Sound Engineers
growingRoles.why: Podcast boom and live event growth drive demand. AI handles mastering and noise reduction, freeing engineers for creative work.

growingRoles.title: Market Research Analysts
growingRoles.why: Data-driven decision-making is growing everywhere. AI automates analysis but the strategic framing of research questions remains human.

growingRoles.title: Actors
growingRoles.why: Streaming platforms and content demand are growing. SAG-AFTRA contracts now protect against unauthorized AI likenesses.
